global.description: The ad features a vibrant teal background with bold text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute travel savings through the DriftPass app.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A solid teal background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Last-minute savings' is prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline reads 'Hotels + flights in one tap', providing additional information.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: An abstract shape in a lighter teal color is positioned in the center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Learn more' in white, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Logo text
elements.description: The word 'DriftPass' appears in bold, large font at the top of the ad, serving as the brand identifier.

elements.label: Decorative icon
elements.description: A small circular icon in the top right corner, possibly representing a feature or service.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape in a lighter shade, positioned near the center, contributing to the design.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Text at the bottom of the ad reiterates the offer with 'Last-minute savings Hotels flights in one tap'.
elements.text_content: Last-minute savings Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The brand name 'DriftPass' is displayed prominently at the top in a bold, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A small button at the bottom with the text 'Learn more', encouraging user engagement.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the logo is at the top, and the CTA is at the bottom.
